html:
SUMMARY DISMISSAL

Reference: {{ doc.name }}
Date: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(frappe.utils.today()) }}

To:
{{ doc.employee_name }}
{{ doc.designation }}
Employee ID: {{ doc.employee }}

Subject: {{ doc.warning_level }}

Dear {{ doc.employee_name }},

This letter serves as formal notification of your {{ doc.warning_level }} regarding the incident that occurred on {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.date_of_offense) }}.

Details:

{{ doc.description }}

Your employment with this organization is terminated effective immediately. This offense has resulted in summary dismissal.

Next Steps:

  • Return all company equipment and documents immediately
  • Complete exit interview with HR Department
  • Settlement of final dues will be processed according to labor laws

We wish you the best in your future endeavors.

Sincerely,
name: Summary Dismissal Letter
